3197100.name: Robinson Crusoe : The Lost Tribes
3197100.description:
"Stranded. Alone. Survival is your only hope."

After a devastating shipwreck, you awaken as Robinson Crusoe, stranded on a mysterious Caribbean island. The fight for survival begins immediately—battle hunger, thirst, and relentless predators while uncovering the island’s darkest secrets. Scavenge resources, craft essential tools, and build shelters to withstand the harsh wilderness.

But survival is only the beginning. The island is home to ancient ruins, warring tribes, and a terrifying enemy—ruthless cannibals who hunt in the shadows. To endure, you must form an unlikely alliance with Friday, a captive native. Together, you’ll infiltrate enemy camps, raid forbidden lands, and uncover a hidden past that will challenge your very humanity.

Every decision shapes your fate. Will you hold onto your morals, or will the island turn you into a predator?

Key Features:

Survive the Wild

Master Resource Management – Nature is Both Friend and Foe

Every day is a fight for survival. Your stomach growls, supplies run low, and the island gives nothing for free. If you want to live, you must find water, food, and materials to craft tools.

  • Water is key – Dehydration will kill you faster than hunger. Find fresh water sources, collect rainwater, or learn how to purify seawater.

  • Hunting and fishing – Set traps for animals, use a spear for fishing, or make a simple fishing rod.

  • Gather plants and mushrooms – Every plant can be medicine or poison. Experiment with the local flora and discover herbs that can help with wounds, sickness, or poison.

Build Your Shelter, Build Your Strength

From a simple hut to a fortified hideout – every structure you build improves your chances of survival.

  • Shelters – Protect yourself from storms, wild animals, and enemies.

  • Crafting stations – Unlock better tools, weapons, and gear.

  • Storage – Keep food and water for tough times.

  • Farming – Grow your own food and use natural fertilizers like bat guano to boost your crops.

Grow Your Own Food – Farming & Cultivation

Survival isn’t just about hunting – the island offers ways to live off the land.

  • Plant a variety of crops – Find seeds in shipwrecks or collect them from local plants. Grow wheat, corn, beans, tropical fruit, and healing herbs.

  • Improve your soil – Fertilize your crops with natural resources to make them grow faster.

  • Tame animals – If you figure out how, you could raise your own livestock or chickens.

Will you grow enough food to survive? Or will you take what you need by force?

Deep Crafting System – From Primitive Tools to Deadly Arsenal

Every stick and stone could mean the difference between life and death. Crafting is at the heart of survival.

  • Basic tools – Start with stone knives, spears, and handmade bows.

  • Advanced weapons – Learn to create stronger weapons and even primitive explosives using natural sulfur.

  • Protective gear – Use bones, leather, and metal scraps to craft armor.

  • Traps and snares – Defend your camp and improve your hunting skills.

The best survivors aren’t the strongest – they’re the smartest.

A Rich and Evolving Storyline

Immerse yourself in a deep and gripping narrative inspired by the timeless tale of Robinson Crusoe. In Early Access, players will experience Chapters 1 and 2, focusing on the struggle for survival and the bonds of friendship. The full game will expand the journey with all four chapters, leading to an epic conflict and a decisive battle for the island’s future.

  • Act 1: Survival – Gather resources, build shelter, and uncover the island’s hidden dangers, including hostile cannibal tribes.

  • Act 2: Friendship – Rescue Friday, forge alliances, and confront the Swamp Tribe.

  • Act 3: Conflict (Full Release) – Escape captivity, unite tribes, and challenge Arimak’s rule.

  • Act 4: Final Battle (Full Release) – Lead an all-out war against the Kanaimás and face the shaman Yukaba in a climactic confrontation.

Your choices and actions shape Robinson’s fate—will you conquer the island’s perils or fall victim to its unforgiving nature?

Explore Ancient Mysteries

Unravel Tribal Conflicts – Choose Your Allies (or Enemies)

You are not alone on the island. Three rival tribes fight for control over the land and its resources.

  • Swamp Tribe – Mysterious people who live in the marshes, masters of poisons and hallucinogens.

  • Warrior Tribe – Ruthless fighters led by Arimak, a brutal leader. If they capture you, you’ll have to fight for your life in the arena.

  • Kanaimás – The greatest threat. These cannibal fanatics believe eating their enemies gives them supernatural power.

Who will you befriend? Who will you fight? And what if none of them truly want you to survive?

Face Deadly Biomes – The Island is Alive

Every environment hides both danger and valuable resources.

  • Dense jungle – Full of snakes, jaguars, and unseen warriors.

  • Dark caves – Ritual sites of the Kanaimás, with traces of volcanic activity and natural sulfur deposits.

  • Swamps – Home to poisonous plants and silent killers from the Swamp Tribe.

The island is watching. Are you the hunter… or the prey?

Fight Smarter, Survive Longer

Stealth, Strategy & Brutal Combat

Combat is inevitable. But survival isn’t just about strength – it’s about being smart.

  • Stealth and ambushes – Your enemies are strong, but if you strike first, you have a chance.

  • Use the terrain – Cliffs, water, and obstacles can help you escape or trap enemies.

  • Face-to-face combat – When there’s no other option, fight to win. Every hit must count.

Adaptive Enemy AI – The Island Fights Back

Your enemies learn. If you ambush them too often, they will guard their camps. If you use traps, they will find ways around them.

Stay unpredictable. Or become prey.


Will You Escape?

You are lost. Alone. On an island full of deadly threats. But survival is not the goal – it’s just the beginning.

  • Will you build a raft and escape?

  • Will you conquer the island and rule over the tribes?

  • Or will you uncover the dark secrets of those who came before you?

Every choice could be your last. Get ready. The island is waiting.

Join our community on Discord and follow us for updates!

Add to Wishlist and prepare to fight for your life.
